# BackROLL-strona
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pl">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>BackROLL — oferta</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=Instrument+Serif:ital@0;1&family=Bebas+Neue&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  :root {
    --orange: #E85D2E;
    --dark: #141414;
    --dark2: #1E1E1E;
    --dark3: #2A2A2A;
    --gray: #5A5A5A;
    --light-gray: #A0A0A0;
    --off-white: #F0EDE8;
    --white: #FFFFFF;
    --border: rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
  }

  html, body {
    width: 100%; height: 100%;
    background: var(--dark);
    color: var(--white);
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    overflow: hidden;
    user-select: none;
  }

  .slides { width: 100%; height: 100%; position: relative; }

  .slide {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column;
    opacity: 0; pointer-events: none;
    transition: opacity 0.5s ease;
  }
  .slide.active { opacity: 1; pointer-events: all; }

  /* NAV */
  .nav {
    position: fixed; bottom: 2rem; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 0.6rem 1.2rem;
    border-radius: 100px;
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    z-index: 100;
  }
  .nav button {
    background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer;
    color: var(--light-gray); font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 100px;
    transition: all 0.2s;
  }
  .nav button:hover { color: var(--white); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); }
  .nav .dots { display: flex; gap: 6px; align-items: center; }
  .dot {
    width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--gray); cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .dot.active { background: var(--orange); width: 20px; border-radius: 3px; }

  .hint {
    position: fixed; top: 1.5rem; right: 1.5rem;
    font-size: 11px; color: var(--gray); letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
    cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.2s;
    z-index: 100;
  }
  .hint:hover { color: var(--light-gray); }

  /* ══ SLIDE 1 — PORTFOLIO ══ */
  #s1 {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    background: var(--dark);
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  /* Left: branding */
  .s1-left {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: space-between;
    padding: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 4rem);
    position: relative; z-index: 2;
    background: var(--dark);
  }

  /* BackROLL logo */
  .br-logo {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.5rem;
  }
  .br-icon {
    width: 52px; height: 52px;
    background: var(--orange); border-radius: 12px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    position: relative; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }
  .br-notch {
    position: absolute; background: var(--dark);
    width: 6px; height: 4px; border-radius: 1.5px;
  }
  .br-wordmark {
    line-height: 0.9;
  }
  .br-back {
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(48px, 6vw, 80px);
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
    color: var(--white);
    display: block;
  }
  .br-roll {
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(48px, 6vw, 80px);
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
    color: var(--orange);
    display: block;
    margin-top: -10px;
  }
  .br-by {
    font-family: 'Instrument Serif', serif;
    font-style: italic;
    font-size: clamp(12px, 1.3vw, 16px);
    color: var(--light-gray);
    margin-top: 0.3rem;
  }

  /* Tag line big */
  .s1-tagline {
    font-size: clamp(12px, 1.4vw, 17px);
    font-weight: 400;
    color: var(--light-gray);
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    line-height: 1.6;
    max-width: 320px;
  }
  .s1-tagline strong {
    color: var(--white); font-weight: 600;
  }

  /* Services list */
  .s1-services {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem;
  }
  .s1-svc {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    font-size: clamp(11px, 1vw, 13px);
    color: var(--light-gray); font-weight: 500;
  }
  .s1-svc::before {
    content: '';
    width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--orange); flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  /* Right: photo grid */
  .s1-right {
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-rows: 1fr 1fr;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 3px;
  }

  .photo-cell {
    overflow: hidden; position: relative;
    background: var(--dark3);
  }
  .photo-cell.tall {
    grid-row: 1 / 3;
  }
  .photo-cell img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    object-position: center;
    display: block;
    transition: transform 0.6s ease;
    filter: brightness(0.92) contrast(1.05);
  }
  .photo-cell:hover img {
    transform: scale(1.04);
  }

  /* Orange accent bar top */
  .s1-right::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 3px; background: var(--orange);
    z-index: 10;
  }

  /* Photo overlay label */
  .photo-overlay {
    position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(0,0,0,0.6));
    padding: 1.5rem 1rem 0.8rem;
    z-index: 5;
  }
  .photo-label {
    font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
  }

  /* Vertical text on left edge */
  .s1-vert {
    position: absolute; left: -1rem; top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(-90deg);
    font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.2em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gray);
    white-space: nowrap; z-index: 10;
  }

  /* ══ SLIDE 2 — SOCIAL MEDIA PAKIETY ══ */
  #s2 { background: var(--dark); }
  #s3 { background: var(--dark); }
  #s4 {
    justify-content: center; align-items: center;
    background: var(--dark); overflow: hidden; position: relative;
  }

  .slide-inner {
    flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
    padding: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2.5rem) clamp(2rem, 5vw, 5rem);
    gap: clamp(1rem, 2vh, 1.8rem);
    max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto; width: 100%;
  }

  .slide-header {
    display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: space-between;
    flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem;
  }
  .slide-eyebrow {
    font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--orange); margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  }
  .slide-title {
    font-size: clamp(24px, 3.5vw, 42px);
    font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.03em; line-height: 1.1;
  }

  /* small logo header */
  .s-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }
  .s-logo-icon {
    width: 28px; height: 28px; background: var(--orange);
    border-radius: 7px; display: flex; align-items: center;
    justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .s-logo-wordmark {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column;
  }
  .s-logo-back {
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    color: var(--white); line-height: 1;
  }
  .s-logo-roll {
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    color: var(--orange); line-height: 1; margin-top: -2px;
  }
  .s-logo-by {
    font-family: 'Instrument Serif', serif;
    font-style: italic; font-size: 9px; color: var(--gray);
  }

  .pkg-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: clamp(10px, 1.5vw, 18px); flex: 1;
  }
  .event-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: clamp(10px, 1.5vw, 18px); flex: 1;
  }

  .pkg-card, .event-card {
    background: var(--dark2); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 16px; padding: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.5rem);
    display: flex; flex-direction: column;
    gap: clamp(0.6rem, 1vh, 0.9rem); position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    transition: transform 0.3s, border-color 0.3s;
    animation: fadeUp 0.5s ease both;
  }
  .pkg-card:hover, .event-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); }
  .pkg-card.featured, .event-card.featured {
    border-color: var(--orange);
    background: linear-gradient(160deg, #1e1e1e 0%, #221510 100%);
  }
  .pkg-card.featured::before, .event-card.featured::before {
    content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    height: 2px; background: var(--orange);
  }
  .pkg-card:nth-child(1), .event-card:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.05s; }
  .pkg-card:nth-child(2), .event-card:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.15s; }
  .pkg-card:nth-child(3), .event-card:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.25s; }

  .pkg-badge {
    display: inline-block; background: var(--orange); color: var(--white);
    font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase; padding: 4px 12px;
    border-radius: 100px; margin-bottom: 0.3rem; width: fit-content;
  }
  .pkg-name {
    font-size: clamp(11px, 1vw, 13px); font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--light-gray);
  }
  .pkg-price {
    font-size: clamp(28px, 3.5vw, 44px);
    font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.04em; line-height: 1;
  }
  .pkg-price sup {
    font-size: 0.4em; font-weight: 500; color: var(--light-gray); vertical-align: super;
  }
  .pkg-period {
    font-size: clamp(10px, 0.9vw, 12px); color: var(--gray);
    font-weight: 500; margin-top: 2px;
  }
  .pkg-divider { height: 1px; background: var(--border); flex-shrink: 0; }
  .pkg-section-label {
    font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gray); margin-bottom: 2px;
  }
  .pkg-items { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; flex: 1; }
  .pkg-item {
    display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px;
    font-size: clamp(11px, 1vw, 13px); line-height: 1.4;
  }
  .pkg-item::before {
    content: ''; width: 5px; height: 5px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--orange); flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 5px;
  }
  .pkg-item-muted { color: var(--gray); font-size: 0.9em; }
  .pkg-tt {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 12px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    font-size: clamp(10px, 0.9vw, 12px);
  }
  .pkg-tt-label { color: var(--light-gray); }
  .pkg-tt-price {
    background: var(--dark3); color: var(--white);
    font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; padding: 3px 10px;
    border-radius: 100px; letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }
  .event-pill {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 100px; padding: 4px 10px;
    font-size: 10px; color: var(--light-gray); font-weight: 500; width: fit-content;
  }
  .addon-row {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 12px;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px;
  }
  .addon-label-sm {
    font-size: 9px; color: var(--gray); letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600;
  }
  .addon-row-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }
  .addon-name { font-size: clamp(11px, 1vw, 13px); color: var(--light-gray); }
  .addon-price-tag { color: var(--orange); font-size: clamp(11px, 1vw, 13px); font-weight: 700; }

  .notes-strip {
    background: var(--dark2); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 10px; padding: 0.7rem 1.2rem;
    display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.4rem 2rem;
  }
  .note-item { font-size: clamp(9px, 0.85vw, 11px); color: var(--gray); }
  .note-item::before { content: '· '; color: var(--orange); }

  /* SLIDE 4 CONTACT */
  #s4 .bg-circle {
    position: absolute; width: 600px; height: 600px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(232,93,46,0.12) 0%, transparent 70%);
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  #s4 .contact-wrap {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
    gap: 2.5rem; position: relative; z-index: 2;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease both;
  }
  #s4 .c-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; }
  #s4 .c-logo-wordmark { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
  #s4 .c-back {
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(36px, 5.5vw, 64px); letter-spacing: 0.03em;
    color: var(--white); line-height: 0.9;
  }
  #s4 .c-roll {
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(36px, 5.5vw, 64px); letter-spacing: 0.03em;
    color: var(--orange); line-height: 0.9;
  }
  #s4 .c-by {
    font-family: 'Instrument Serif', serif; font-style: italic;
    font-size: clamp(13px, 1.5vw, 17px); color: var(--light-gray); margin-top: 4px;
  }
  .contact-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    gap: 1rem; width: clamp(300px, 50vw, 600px);
  }
  .c-item {
    background: var(--dark2); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 14px; padding: 1.2rem 1.5rem;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem;
    transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
  }
  .c-item:hover { border-color: rgba(232,93,46,0.4); transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .c-icon {
    width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 10px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .c-icon.orange { background: var(--orange); }
  .c-icon.dark { background: var(--dark3); }
  .c-label { font-size: 10px; color: var(--gray); font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 2px; }
  .c-value { font-size: clamp(12px, 1.2vw, 14px); font-weight: 500; }

  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="hint" onclick="toggleFS()">⛶ pełny ekran</div>

<div class="slides">

  <!-- ══ SLIDE 1: PORTFOLIO ══ -->
  <div class="slide active" id="s1">

    <div class="s1-left">
      <!-- Logo -->
      <div class="br-logo">
        <div class="br-icon">
          <div class="br-notch" style="top:5px;left:5px;"></div>
          <div class="br-notch" style="top:5px;left:14px;"></div>
          <div class="br-notch" style="top:5px;left:23px;"></div>
          <div class="br-notch" style="top:5px;left:32px;"></div>
          <div class="br-notch" style="bottom:5px;left:5px;"></div>
          <div class="br-notch" style="bottom:5px;left:14px;"></div>
          <div class="br-notch" style="bottom:5px;left:23px;"></div>
          <div class="br-notch" style="bottom:5px;left:32px;"></div>
          <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="var(--dark)" style="position:relative;z-index:2;"><polygon points="5,3 19,12 5,21"/></svg>
        </div>
        <div class="br-wordmark">
          <span class="br-back">Back</span>
          <span class="br-roll">ROLL</span>
        </div>
        <div class="br-by">by Adrian Marszałek</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Tagline -->
      <div class="s1-tagline">
        Nagrywam. Montuję. Publikuję.<br><br>
        <strong>Jestem za kamerą</strong> — Twoja marka jest przed nią.
      </div>

      <!-- Services -->
      <div class="s1-services">
        <div class="s1-svc">Obsługa Social Mediów (IG, FB, TikTok)</div>
        <div class="s1-svc">Rolki i Reelsy nagrywane u Ciebie</div>
        <div class="s1-svc">Profesjonalny montaż wideo</div>
        <div class="s1-svc">Obsługa eventów i festiwali</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Photos right -->
    <div class="s1-right">
      <!-- Tall photo left -->
      <div class="photo-cell tall">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Portfolio" loading="eager">
      </div>
      <!-- Two stacked right -->
      <div class="photo-cell">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Portfolio" loading="eager">
      </div>
      <div class="photo-cell">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Portfolio" loading="eager">
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- ══ SLIDE 2: SOCIAL MEDIA ══ -->
  <div class="slide" id="s2">
    <div class="slide-inner">
      <div class="slide-header">
        <div>
          <div class="slide-eyebrow">Pakiety miesięczne</div>
          <div class="slide-title">Obsługa Social Mediów</div>
        </div>
        <div class="s-logo">
          <div class="s-logo-icon">
            <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="white"><polygon points="5,3 19,12 5,21"/></svg>
          </div>
          <div class="s-logo-wordmark">
            <span class="s-logo-back">Back</span>
            <span class="s-logo-roll">ROLL</span>
            <span class="s-logo-by">by Adrian Marszałek</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="pkg-grid">
        <div class="pkg-card">
          <div class="pkg-name">Start</div>
          <div>
            <div class="pkg-price">899<sup> zł</sup></div>
            <div class="pkg-period">miesięcznie</div>
          </div>
          <div class="pkg-divider"></div>
          <div class="pkg-items">
            <div class="pkg-section-label">Posty</div>
            <div class="pkg-item">5 postów IG + FB</div>
            <div class="pkg-section-label" style="margin-top:4px;">Relacje</div>
            <div class="pkg-item">10 relacji <span class="pkg-item-muted">(przebitki nagrane)</span></div>
            <div class="pkg-section-label" style="margin-top:4px;">Rolki</div>
            <div class="pkg-item">3 rolki <span class="pkg-item-muted">(nagrywane u klienta)</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="pkg-divider"></div>
          <div class="pkg-items">
            <div class="pkg-item">Montaż i publikacja</div>
            <div class="pkg-item">Prawa autorskie po zapłacie</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pkg-card featured">
          <div class="pkg-badge">Najpopularniejszy</div>
          <div class="pkg-name">Pro</div>
          <div>
            <div class="pkg-price">1&nbsp;299<sup> zł</sup></div>
            <div class="pkg-period">miesięcznie</div>
          </div>
          <div class="pkg-divider"></div>
          <div class="pkg-items">
            <div class="pkg-section-label">Posty</div>
            <div class="pkg-item">10 postów IG + FB</div>
            <div class="pkg-section-label" style="margin-top:4px;">Relacje</div>
            <div class="pkg-item">13 relacji <span class="pkg-item-muted">(przebitki nagrane)</span></div>
            <div class="pkg-section-label" style="margin-top:4px;">Rolki</div>
            <div class="pkg-item">5 rolek <span class="pkg-item-muted">(nagrywane u klienta)</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="pkg-divider"></div>
          <div class="pkg-items">
            <div class="pkg-item">Montaż i publikacja</div>
            <div class="pkg-item">Prawa autorskie po zapłacie</div>
            <div class="pkg-item">Raport zasięgów</div>
          </div>
          <div class="pkg-tt">
            <span class="pkg-tt-label">🎵 TikTok w cenie</span>
            <span class="pkg-tt-price">gratis</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="pkg-card">
          <div class="pkg-name">Max</div>
          <div>
            <div class="pkg-price">1&nbsp;699<sup> zł</sup></div>
            <div class="pkg-period">miesięcznie</div>
          </div>
          <div class="pkg-divider"></div>
          <div class="pkg-items">
            <div class="pkg-section-label">Posty</div>
            <div class="pkg-item">15 postów IG + FB</div>
            <div class="pkg-section-label" style="margin-top:4px;">Relacje</div>
            <div class="pkg-item">20 relacji <span class="pkg-item-muted">(przebitki nagrane)</span></div>
            <div class="pkg-section-label" style="margin-top:4px;">Rolki</div>
            <div class="pkg-item">10 rolek <span class="pkg-item-muted">(nagrywane u klienta)</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="pkg-divider"></div>
          <div class="pkg-items">
            <div class="pkg-item">Montaż i publikacja</div>
            <div class="pkg-item">Prawa autorskie po zapłacie</div>
            <div class="pkg-item">Raport zasięgów</div>
            <div class="pkg-item">Priorytet realizacji</div>
          </div>
          <div class="pkg-tt">
            <span class="pkg-tt-label">🎵 TikTok w cenie</span>
            <span class="pkg-tt-price">gratis</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="notes-strip">
        <span class="note-item">Min. 3 miesiące współpracy</span>
        <span class="note-item">Dojazd 30 km gratis, dalej 0,89 zł/km</span>
        <span class="note-item">Grafiki i teksty w cenie</span>
        <span class="note-item">Rozliczenie miesięczne z góry</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ══ SLIDE 3: EVENTY ══ -->
  <div class="slide" id="s3">
    <div class="slide-inner">
      <div class="slide-header">
        <div>
          <div class="slide-eyebrow">Jednorazowe zlecenia</div>
          <div class="slide-title">Obsługa Eventów</div>
        </div>
        <div class="s-logo">
          <div class="s-logo-icon">
            <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="white"><polygon points="5,3 19,12 5,21"/></svg>
          </div>
          <div class="s-logo-wordmark">
            <span class="s-logo-back">Back</span>
            <span class="s-logo-roll">ROLL</span>
            <span class="s-logo-by">by Adrian Marszałek</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="event-grid">
        <div class="event-card">
          <div class="pkg-name">Half day</div>
          <div class="event-pill">⏱ do 4h na miejscu</div>
          <div>
            <div class="pkg-price">899<sup> zł</sup></div>
            <div class="pkg-period">za event</div>
          </div>
          <div class="pkg-divider"></div>
          <div class="pkg-items">
            <div class="pkg-section-label">W cenie</div>
            <div class="pkg-item">Nagrywanie do 4h</div>
            <div class="pkg-item">Montaż highlights <span class="pkg-item-muted">(2–3 min)</span></div>
            <div class="pkg-item">3 rolki pionowe <span class="pkg-item-muted">(IG / TT)</span></div>
            <div class="pkg-item">Prawa autorskie po zapłacie</div>
          </div>
          <div class="pkg-divider"></div>
          <div class="addon-row">
            <div class="addon-label-sm">opcjonalnie</div>
            <div class="addon-row-inner">
              <span class="addon-name">📡 Relacje na żywo</span>
              <span class="addon-price-tag">+200 zł</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="event-card featured">
          <div class="pkg-badge">Najczęściej wybierany</div>
          <div class="pkg-name">Full day</div>
          <div class="event-pill">⏱ do 8h na miejscu</div>
          <div>
            <div class="pkg-price">1&nbsp;599<sup> zł</sup></div>
            <div class="pkg-period">za event</div>
          </div>
          <div class="pkg-divider"></div>
          <div class="pkg-items">
            <div class="pkg-section-label">W cenie</div>
            <div class="pkg-item">Nagrywanie do 8h</div>
            <div class="pkg-item">Montaż highlights <span class="pkg-item-muted">(3–5 min)</span></div>
            <div class="pkg-item">5 rolek pionowych <span class="pkg-item-muted">(IG / TT)</span></div>
            <div class="pkg-item">Prawa autorskie po zapłacie</div>
          </div>
          <div class="pkg-divider"></div>
          <div class="addon-row">
            <div class="addon-label-sm">opcjonalnie</div>
            <div class="addon-row-inner">
              <span class="addon-name">📡 Relacje na żywo</span>
              <span class="addon-price-tag">+200 zł</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="event-card">
          <div class="pkg-name">Festiwal</div>
          <div class="event-pill">⏱ 2+ dni / powyżej 8h dziennie</div>
          <div>
            <div class="pkg-price">2&nbsp;199<sup> zł</sup></div>
            <div class="pkg-period">za dzień</div>
          </div>
          <div class="pkg-divider"></div>
          <div class="pkg-items">
            <div class="pkg-section-label">W cenie (każdy dzień)</div>
            <div class="pkg-item">Nagrywanie bez limitu godzin</div>
            <div class="pkg-item">Montaż highlights dzienny</div>
            <div class="pkg-item">5 rolek pionowych <span class="pkg-item-muted">(IG / TT)</span></div>
            <div class="pkg-item">Nocleg <span class="pkg-item-muted">(rezerwuje klient)</span></div>
            <div class="pkg-item">Prawa autorskie po zapłacie</div>
          </div>
          <div class="pkg-divider"></div>
          <div class="addon-row">
            <div class="addon-label-sm">opcjonalnie</div>
            <div class="addon-row-inner">
              <span class="addon-name">📡 Relacje na żywo</span>
              <span class="addon-price-tag">+200 zł/dzień</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="notes-strip">
        <span class="note-item">Zaliczka 50% przy podpisaniu umowy</span>
        <span class="note-item">Dojazd 30 km gratis, dalej 0,89 zł/km w obie strony</span>
        <span class="note-item">Materiały w 5 dni roboczych od eventu</span>
        <span class="note-item">Nocleg: pokój 1-os., śniadanie, max 15 min od miejsca</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ══ SLIDE 4: KONTAKT ══ -->
  <div class="slide" id="s4">
    <div class="bg-circle"></div>
    <div class="contact-wrap">
      <div class="c-logo">
        <div style="width:60px;height:60px;background:var(--orange);border-radius:14px;position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;">
          <div style="position:absolute;top:6px;left:0;right:0;display:flex;justify-content:space-around;padding:0 5px;">
            <div style="width:8px;height:5px;background:var(--dark);border-radius:2px;"></div>
            <div style="width:8px;height:5px;background:var(--dark);border-radius:2px;"></div>
            <div style="width:8px;height:5px;background:var(--dark);border-radius:2px;"></div>
            <div style="width:8px;height:5px;background:var(--dark);border-radius:2px;"></div>
          </div>
          <div style="position:absolute;bottom:6px;left:0;right:0;display:flex;justify-content:space-around;padding:0 5px;">
            <div style="width:8px;height:5px;background:var(--dark);border-radius:2px;"></div>
            <div style="width:8px;height:5px;background:var(--dark);border-radius:2px;"></div>
            <div style="width:8px;height:5px;background:var(--dark);border-radius:2px;"></div>
            <div style="width:8px;height:5px;background:var(--dark);border-radius:2px;"></div>
          </div>
          <svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="var(--dark)"><polygon points="5,3 19,12 5,21"/></svg>
        </div>
        <div class="c-logo-wordmark">
          <div class="c-back">Back</div>
          <div class="c-roll">ROLL</div>
          <div class="c-by">by Adrian Marszałek</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="contact-grid">
        <div class="c-item">
          <div class="c-icon orange">
            <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 01-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 01-8.63-3.07A19.5 19.5 0 013 8.97a19.79 19.79 0 01-3.07-8.67A2 2 0 011.95 2h3a2 2 0 012 1.72 12.84 12.84 0 00.7 2.81 2 2 0 01-.45 2.11L6.09 9.91a16 16 0 006 6l1.27-1.27a2 2 0 012.11-.45 12.84 12.84 0 002.81.7A2 2 0 0122 16.92z"/></svg>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="c-label">Telefon</div>
            <div class="c-value">+48 514-023-556</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="c-item">
          <div class="c-icon dark">
            <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="c-label">Email</div>
            <div class="c-value">back.roll2005@gmail.com</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="c-item" style="grid-column: span 2;">
          <div class="c-icon orange">
            <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="20" rx="5"/><path d="M16 11.37A4 4 0 1112.63 8 4 4 0 0116 11.37z"/><line x1="17.5" y1="6.5" x2="17.51" y2="6.5"/></svg>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="c-label">Instagram</div>
            <div class="c-value">@back.roll2005</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<!-- NAV -->
<div class="nav">
  <button onclick="prev()">←</button>
  <div class="dots">
    <div class="dot active" onclick="goTo(0)"></div>
    <div class="dot" onclick="goTo(1)"></div>
    <div class="dot" onclick="goTo(2)"></div>
    <div class="dot" onclick="goTo(3)"></div>
  </div>
  <button onclick="next()">→</button>
</div>

<script>
  const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.slide');
  const dots   = document.querySelectorAll('.dot');
  let cur = 0;
  function goTo(n) {
    slides[cur].classList.remove('active');
    dots[cur].classList.remove('active');
    cur = (n + slides.length) % slides.length;
    slides[cur].classList.add('active');
    dots[cur].classList.add('active');
  }
  function next() { goTo(cur + 1); }
  function prev() { goTo(cur - 1); }
  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' || e.key === 'ArrowDown') next();
    if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft'  || e.key === 'ArrowUp')   prev();
  });
  function toggleFS() {
    if (!document.fullscreenElement) document.documentElement.requestFullscreen();
    else document.exitFullscreen();
  }
</script>
</body>
</html>
